text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest—a large-scale event
held by Tracen Academy to celebrate the fans.
Amid the festivities, Inari One is...

text_block_list.name: Student Stall Runner
text_block_list.text:
Inari! We're running low on the yakisoba sauce
quicker than we thought!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay! The okonomiyaki stall still has plenty left,
so let's try our luck with them! In the meantime,
get people movin' on restock duty!

text_block_list.name: Student Stall Runner
text_block_list.text: Got it! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Student Stall Runner
text_block_list.text:
Inari! The chef making the carrot fried rice is
about to pass out! Could we get a little help?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Already on it! Just got in touch with the student
council. We're gettin' some extra help soon. Tell
her to hang in there!

text_block_list.name: Student Stall Runner
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Inari! You're really the best in an
emergency!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's been personally requested by the
student council to manage the food stalls, so I
offer to lend a hand.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! It's so busy, my eyes are spinnin'! But a busy festival is a good festival!
choice_data_list: Everything looks to be going well.
Everything looks to be going well.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sure is! But I shouldn't get ahead of myself, not
when the crowd keeps pourin' in.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I heard most of 'em are visitin' just for Oguri. This
year's shapin' up to be the biggest one yet!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But that's how I like it! Can't have a festival
without lotsa noise!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helpin' out, Boss! I know it's tough
havin' ya on the clock since dawn. Make sure to
get some rest if ya can!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helpin' out, Boss! I know it's tough
havin' ya on the clock since dawn. Make sure to
get some rest if ya can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The festival is just as exciting as it is busy, and as
the day progresses...

text_block_list.name: Visiting Fans
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...The number of visitors continues to climb!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yowza! This is wild! I honestly never expected this many people!

text_block_list.name: Student Stall Runner
text_block_list.text:
Inari, we're in trouble! If this keeps up, we won't
be able to serve everyone!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're right, the stalls can't take this many
visitors! We need to thin out the crowd flow...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Management, can ya hear me? Time to pull
out the trick we talked about! Get some helpers
on the ground, stat!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're lookin' at a gal raised on festivals. I
learned a few things from my hometown pals!

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Inari One! We've mapped out the diversion paths,
obtained the tools, and stationed helpers out for
crowd safety. Preparations should be ready soon!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gotta love our student council! Now it's my time
to shine.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Attention, all visitors! I've got a special event in
store for ya today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Just beyond the food 'n' drink area, we're gonna be holdin' a mind-blowin' hashigo nori show! Come and have yourselves a look!

text_block_list.name: Female Visitor
text_block_list.text:
Did she say hashigo nori? As in ladder acrobatics?
Wait, is she going to use that big ladder over
there?!

text_block_list.name: Male Visitor
text_block_list.text: We should check it out!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Now that I've got a good crowd gathered,
it's time to give 'em a show to remember!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah! Hwah!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Whooooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One puts on an amazing acrobatic
performance, drawing visitors away from the food
stalls to see her!

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now that Inari One has the fans distracted,
let's figure out a plan to keep these stalls running!

text_block_list.name: Student Stall Runners
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's more where that came from! Feast your
eyes on this next trick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's stupendous stunts save the day, and
the Fan Fest manages its unprecedented visitor
count with no problems!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, we decide to celebrate the success in
my office.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Phew! Today really got me pooped!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no kiddin'! There's a real master of the stuff
back in my hometown. I learned a whole bunch
there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We do the same thing to break up crowd jams at
our local festivals. After rememberin' that, I
figured I'd share the strategy with the Fan Fest
crew.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
When ya supersize a festival, ya supersize the
plannin'. Being sharp means comin' up with a
whole slew of things to please the guests!
choice_data_list: Right on! That's some real style!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha! All that behind-the-scenes work ya did
was just as cool! Well done to the both of us!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha! All that behind-the-scenes work ya did
was just as cool! Well done to the both of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While complimenting each other on our
respective efforts, we celebrate the closing of a
festival well done.

text_block_list.name: Female Visitor
text_block_list.text:
Did she say hashigo nori? As in ladder acrobatics?
Wait, is she going to use that big ladder over
there?!

text_block_list.name: Male Visitor
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's about to do something crazy! Let's go
check it out!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Now that I've got a good crowd gathered,
it's time to give 'em a show to remember!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah! Hwah!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Whooooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One puts on an amazing acrobatic
performance, drawing visitors away from the food
stalls to see her!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text: Amazing! Keep it up, Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: Eeek! Look, she's waving our way! She's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now that Inari One has the fans distracted,
let's figure out a plan to keep these stalls running!

text_block_list.name: Student Stall Runners
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's more where that came from! Feast your
eyes on this next trick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooow!

text_block_list.name: Male Visitor
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's happening over there? Let's go see!

text_block_list.name: Female Visitor
text_block_list.text:
Whooa, she's really good at that! Let's get a
closer look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's stupendous stunts save the day, and
the Fan Fest manages its unprecedented visitor
count with no problems!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, we decide to celebrate the success in
my office.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Phew! Today really got me pooped!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So many fans came to see me. I really had to turn
up the heat!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no kiddin'! There's a real master of the stuff
back in my hometown. I learned a whole bunch
there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We do the same thing to break up crowd jams at
our local festivals. After rememberin' that, I
figured I'd share the strategy with the Fan Fest
crew.

text_block_list.text:
When ya supersize a festival, ya supersize the
plannin'. Being sharp means comin' up with a
whole slew of things to please the guests!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Bwahaha! All that behind-the-scenes work ya did
was just as cool! Well done to the both of us!

text_block_list.text:
